questions.q: In a move that baffled public health groups, the Trump administration announced in early May 2026 that federal funding would no longer cover which harm-reduction tool?
In May 2026, director Pavel Talankin reported that an airline had lost his recently awarded Documentary Oscar for which film?
questions.correctText: Pavel Talankin stated that his Oscar statuette for 'Mr. Nobody Against Putin' went missing after the TSA forced him to check it in his luggage.

questions.q: Which actor was the center of a five-studio bidding war in late April 2026 to star in a feature film adaptation of the video game 'Battlefield'?
questions.correctText: Five studios submitted bids for a 'Battlefield' movie package starring Michael B. Jordan and directed by Christopher McQuarrie.

questions.q: A 2026 investigation by The Harvard Crimson revealed that players on which university sports team were unknowingly funded by a $25,000 donation from Jeffrey Epstein?
Ben Leonberg, the director of 'Good Boy', was announced in April 2026 to be making 'Follow Mode', a new horror film focused on what piece of technology?
questions.correctText: Leonberg's 'Follow Mode' is a drone horror film where a consumer-grade drone's tracking setting turns deadly.

questions.q: In Game 6 of their 2026 first-round series, the New York Knicks eliminated the Atlanta Hawks 140-89. What record-breaking halftime lead did the Knicks hold in that game?
What pioneering biologist, who privately challenged the Human Genome Project to decode human DNA, passed away at age 79 in late April 2026?
In May 2026, subscribers filed a federal antitrust lawsuit seeking to block Paramount's acquisition deals involving Skydance and which other major studio?
questions.correctText: A class-action lawsuit was filed by subscribers aiming to halt the Paramount, Skydance, and Warner Bros. Discovery merger deals.

questions.q: In 2026, a clinical trial led by Hamilton Health Sciences began testing a carotid artery implant to trap blood clots and prevent strokes, an idea inspired by what everyday kitchen item?
Which physician did President Trump announce as his new pick for U.S. surgeon general on April 30, 2026, after pulling the nomination of Dr. Casey Means?
